name: PER_PERSON_TYPES_VL
query: SELECT B.ROWID ROW_ID, B.PERSON_TYPE_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.ACTIVE_FLAG, B.DEFAULT_FLAG, B.SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE, T.USER_PERSON_TYPE, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.SEEDED_PERSON_TYPE_KEY, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.MODULE_ID, B.SGUID SGUID FROM PER_PERSON_TYPES B, PER_PERSON_TYPES_TL T WHERE B.PERSON_TYPE_ID = T.PERSON_TYPE_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
